filled.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ich verstehe — in eigenen Worten erklären

missing.start_your_microphone_and_try_it_when_: Start your microphone and try it! When you're done, click "Complete."
missing.the_melody_of_your_speech_rising_pitch: The melody of your speech. Rising pitch = questions, falling = statements, variation = emphasis.
missing.how_fast_you_are_speaking_in_words_per: How fast you are speaking in words per minute.
missing.your_speaking_volume_and_steadiness_ov: Your speaking volume and steadiness over time.
missing.good_speakers_use_pauses_aim_for_20_30: Good speakers use pauses! Aim for 20-30% pauses in your speech.
missing.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Analyzes pause patterns, syllable rate consistency, and volume steadiness to generate a fluency score. Record at least 10 seconds of speech, then click "Analyze Fluency."
missing.analyze_fluency_from_current_recording: Analyze fluency from current recording data
missing.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Visualizes your vowel sounds on an IPA vowel quadrilateral using formant analysis (F1/F2). Speak a vowel sound and watch the dot move to show where your vowel falls. Trail mode shows diphthong transitions!
missing.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Green circles = target vowel positions. Orange dot = your current vowel. Purple trail = recent vowel transitions.
missing.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: Recordings are automatically saved when you stop the microphone. Play back with synchronized prosody annotation. Last 3 recordings kept.
missing.no_recordings_yet_start_and_stop_the_m: No recordings yet. Start and stop the microphone to save a recording.
missing.choose_an_exercise_type_the_tool_will_: Choose an exercise type. The tool will give you phrases to practice with real-time prosody feedback.
missing.say_this_phrase_with_the_emotion_below: Say this phrase with the emotion below. Watch how your pitch and volume change!
missing.say_the_phrase_with_this_feeling_notic: Say the phrase with THIS feeling. Notice what happens to your pitch!
missing.i_practiced_this_phrase_record_it: I practiced this phrase, record it
missing.say_the_same_words_as_a_statement_pitc: Say the same words as a statement (pitch falls at the end) and as a question (pitch rises). Watch the difference on the pitch graph!
missing.the_same_sentence_means_different_thin: The same sentence means different things depending on which word you stress. Select a word below, then say the sentence emphasizing that word.
missing.read_the_passage_below_at_the_target_s: Read the passage below at the target speed. The speedometer will show you how fast you are going!
missing.keep_going_hold_your_volume_steady: Keep going! Hold your volume steady.
missing.target_pitch_pattern_green_zone_target: Target pitch pattern (green zone = target, orange = your pitch):
missing.say_the_phrase_now_try_to_match_the_gr: Say the phrase now! Try to match the green target zone.
missing.slps_use_specific_prosody_patterns_as_: SLPs use specific prosody patterns as clinical targets. Select a pattern to see the target pitch contour and practice matching it.
missing.practice_pronunciation_in_any_language: Practice pronunciation in any language! The AI will model the phrase, then you try to match its prosody.
missing.hear_the_ai_model_speak_this_phrase: Hear the AI model speak this phrase
missing.your_turn_to_speak_the_phrase: Your turn to speak the phrase
missing.your_turn_speak_the_phrase_and_try_to_: Your turn! Speak the phrase and try to match the pitch pattern.
missing.dashed_line_model_solid_line_your_spee: Dashed line = model, solid line = your speech. Try to make them match!
missing.prosody_comparison_graph_showing_model: Prosody comparison graph showing model curve and your speech curve overlaid
missing.summary_of_your_practice_session_share: Summary of your practice session. Share this with your speech-language pathologist!
missing.generate_a_text_summary_of_this_sessio: Generate a text summary of this session that you can share with your speech-language pathologist.
missing.clear_all_session_data_and_start_fresh: Clear all session data and start fresh
missing.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Go back to STEM Lab tool list
missing.speech_prosody_visualization_for_slp_r: Speech prosody visualization for SLP-recommended practice
missing.live_visualizer_record_read_your_deliv: Live visualizer — record + read your delivery
missing.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Real-time pitch trace + volume meter + filler-word counter. Trained speakers vary pitch ~30% across a sentence; flat delivery loses listener attention within ~20 seconds.
missing.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Pacing target ~150 wpm. Pauses between ideas (1–2 seconds) carry as much weight as the words. Read your own writing aloud first; awkward sentences reveal themselves immediately.
missing.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Speech rate varies dramatically by language: Spanish + Japanese ~7 syllables/sec; English ~6; Mandarin ~5. Information rate is roughly constant — denser languages talk slower.
missing.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Pace, pitch range, filler-word density, pause timing — each scored against research-backed targets. Click any dimension for a citation + a coaching tip.
missing.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Prosody — discover how delivery shapes meaning
missing.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Adjust pitch offset, pace, and volume gain, then log what you notice. No score, no reveal — form your own hypothesis about why most TED talks sit near 150 wpm.
missing.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Default for most speaking. Natural rhythm.
missing.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Adjust pitch offset, pacing, volume. Discrete 4-tempo classification. No score, no reveal.
missing.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Hypothesis: How does pace affect audience comprehension?
missing.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Most TED talks are ~150 wpm. Investigate why.
missing.when_does_pitch_variation_help_vs_dist: When does pitch variation help vs distract?
missing.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Explain how prosody shapes oratory impact.
missing.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Design note: discrete 4-tempo marker; no delivery score; no reveal — by design.
missing.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: This tool is designed as a Tier 1 classroom intervention. For individualized speech therapy, please consult a certified Speech-Language Pathologist.
missing.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Visualizations use Web Audio API pitch detection (autocorrelation) and amplitude analysis. All processing happens locally in the browser — no audio is recorded or transmitted.
